name_en: !!️With full original green box packaging!!️Gucci Horsebit Chain series small shoulder bag. Gucci reinterprets brand classic elements, cleverly blending heritage design with fashion creativity to showcase contemporary aesthetic concepts. This handbag is exquisitely embellished with the bit chain design that was popular in the early 2000s, inheriting the brand's classic style. The 2023 Fall/Winter series reinterprets this model, using various colors and textures to highlight a modern style. Light blue quilted leather, palladium hardware. As a selected item with a Gucci Tag, this product supports NFC technology for a digital innovative experience. Silk lining, bit chain, interior: one card slot and one pocket, detachable leather strap (23cm high), detachable chain shoulder strap (19cm high), magnetic snap closure.

The 2023 Fall/Winter series reinterprets this model, using various colors and textures to highlight a modern style. Light blue quilted leather, palladium hardware. As a selected item with a Gucci Tag, this product supports NFC technology for a digital innovative experience. Silk lining, bit chain, interior: one card slot and one pocket, detachable leather strap (23cm high), detachable chain shoulder strap (19cm high), magnetic snap closure.
Model: 764339.
Size: 11.5(L)x 27(W)x 5cm(D)
Color: Iridescent Blue/Original Leather.
Made in Italy
Max capacity: iPhone Pro Max/Plus, Airpods, small wallet, and lipstick
